source_jobs.title: Account Receivable Specialist
Customer Support Representative
Data Engineer
Data Scientist
DevOps Engineer
source_jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Analytical Wizards is part of the Definitive Healthcare family. We balance innovation with an open, friendly culture and the backing of a long-established parent company, known for its ethical reputation. We guide customers from what’s now to what’s next by unlocking the value of their data and applications to solve their challenges, achieving outcomes that benefit both business and society. Our people are our biggest asset, they drive our innovation advantage and we strive to offer a flexible and collaborative workplace where they can thrive. We offer industry-leading benefits packages to promote a creative and inclusive culture. If driving real change gives you a sense of pride and you are passionate about powering social good, we’d love to hear from you.</p></div><p style="text-align: left;"><strong>Designation&nbsp; :</strong>DevOps Engineer<strong><br>Location: </strong>Bangalore<strong><br>Work Mode:</strong> Hybrid<strong><br>Experience Required:</strong> 2–4 years<strong><br><br>Job Summary<br><br></strong>We are looking for a Professional Services OPS Engineer to support client-facing data<br>operations and workflow execution. This role focuses on job monitoring, issue resolution,<br>data sharing, and operational support across multiple platforms to ensure reliable and<br>timely client deliverables.<strong><br><br>Key Responsibilities<br><br></strong>• Monitor and troubleshoot job failures in Visual Cron, Argo, and Databricks<br>• Perform root-cause analysis and implement fixes to maintain workflow stability<br>• Build, schedule, and maintain workflows using Visual Cron, Argo, Databricks Jobs, and<br>Snowflake Tasks<br>• Manage data sharing and deliveries via Databricks Share, Snowflake Share, S3, and SFTP<br>• Push MDE and non-MDE data to client environments post job success<br>• Support monthly refresh cycles, reruns, backfills, and ad-hoc operational requests<br>• Handle client and internal PS inquiries related to deliverables and missing files<br>• Collaborate with internal teams to improve operational processes<strong><br><br>Required Skills<br><br>• </strong>Hands-on experience with job schedulers (Visual Cron preferred)<br>• Argo or Airflow workflow orchestration<br>• Strong working knowledge of Databricks<br>• SQL for data validation and troubleshooting<br>• Python for scripting and automation<br>• Basic knowledge of S3<br>• Experience with SFTP-based data deliveries<br><strong><br>Good to Have<br></strong><br>• Snowflake Tasks and Snowflake Share<br>• Azure Blob Storage Exposure and Experience supporting client-facing or production systems.</p>

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Application Engineer
source_jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Analytical Wizards is part of the Definitive Healthcare family. We balance innovation with an open, friendly culture and the backing of a long-established parent company, known for its ethical reputation. We guide customers from what’s now to what’s next by unlocking the value of their data and applications to solve their challenges, achieving outcomes that benefit both business and society. Our people are our biggest asset, they drive our innovation advantage and we strive to offer a flexible and collaborative workplace where they can thrive. We offer industry-leading benefits packages to promote a creative and inclusive culture. If driving real change gives you a sense of pride and you are passionate about powering social good, we’d love to hear from you.</p></div><p><strong>Job Role <br></strong><br>We’re looking for a CPQ Specialist to join our team of Salesforce Admins,&nbsp;Developers and Analysts. We’re looking for someone possessing a highly&nbsp;collaborative work style operating efficiently in a dynamic small-team<br>environment. You should be able to demonstrate knowledge and have a history&nbsp;of helping to deliver CPQ (Configure Price Quote) solutions as a technical&nbsp;resource. Ideally you will have some experience with Revenue Cloud as we will&nbsp;be migrating to that solution in the near-term future. This position can be&nbsp;remote or work from our Bengaluru office and will need to work hours that&nbsp;significantly overlap with our East Coast US based company hours.<br><br><strong>Work you’ll do<br></strong><br>Work within our Enterprise Applications Team to support the business and be responsible for helping configure CPQ to the designed specification, provide initial testing to ensure compliance, and assist both building out test scripts and User Acceptance Testing. You will also help support the Admins and Analysts with daily tasks, documentation, and tech debt remediation and other projects as presented by the business. You may also be asked to assist with other related applications such as DocuSign, Own Backup, Ring Lead and others.<br><br><strong>Required Qualifications</strong><br>• Salesforce CPQ, Admin &amp; Platform I Developer Certified<br>• Experience with: Advanced Approvals, Price Rules, Advanced Order&nbsp;Management<br>• Functional knowledge of 3rd Party Applications: Document generation&nbsp;and eSignature, such as DocuSign<br>• Experience in onsite technical roles on full-lifecycle Lead-to-Cash projects,&nbsp;with strong application, integration, and data migration technical&nbsp;solution and implementation expertise Salesforce CPQ<br>• Integration expertise to ERP’s such as NetSuite, SAP, Sage or others<br>• Strong English oral and written communication skills<br><br><strong>Preferred Qualifications<br></strong><br>• Proficiency in Apex, Visualforce, Salesforce Lightning Components, and&nbsp;Salesforce APIs.<br>• Experience working on projects that included an integration to NetSuite.<br>• Salesforce Revenue Cloud Consultant Certified<br>• Ability to work independently and manage multiple assignments<br>• 5+ years of functional, hands-on Salesforce CPQ experience<br>• Deep CPQ experience for a SaaS, technology subscription businesses, to&nbsp;include renewals of contracts, add-ons or amendments to contracts, and&nbsp;co-termination of contracts.</p>

source_jobs.title: Senior Data Scientist
Senior Software Engineer
Senior Software Engineer-C#
source_jobs.description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Analytical Wizards is part of the Definitive Healthcare family. We balance innovation with an open, friendly culture and the backing of a long-established parent company, known for its ethical reputation. We guide customers from what’s now to what’s next by unlocking the value of their data and applications to solve their challenges, achieving outcomes that benefit both business and society. Our people are our biggest asset, they drive our innovation advantage and we strive to offer a flexible and collaborative workplace where they can thrive. We offer industry-leading benefits packages to promote a creative and inclusive culture. If driving real change gives you a sense of pride and you are passionate about powering social good, we’d love to hear from you.</p></div><p><strong>Designation – Senior Software Engineer -C#</strong><br><strong>Location – Bangalore</strong><br><strong>Work Mode- Hybrid<br></strong><br><strong>Required Qualifications<br></strong><br>• 5+ years of professional software development experience in a fast-paced Agile environment<br>• Strong experience with C#, .NET, and .NET Core (.NET 5+ preferred)<br>• Solid understanding of computer science fundamentals, object-oriented programming,&nbsp;SOLID principles, and design patterns<br>• Experience designing and developing RESTful APIs and distributed systems<br>• Hands-on experience with relational databases such as PostgreSQL, MS SQL Server, or&nbsp;MySQL<br>• Experience working with large datasets and optimizing database/query performance<br>• Experience building or supporting complex ETL/data integration pipelines across multiple&nbsp;platforms<br>• Experience working with public cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP (AWS preferred)<br>• Familiarity with cloud-native architectures, containerization, and microservices<br>• Experience with Docker and containerized application deployment<br>• Understanding of software testing methodologies including unit, integration, system, and&nbsp;performance testing<br>• Ability to independently deliver high-quality software with minimal supervision<br>• Strong problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills.<br><br><strong>Preferred Qualifications<br></strong><br>• Experience with front-end technologies such as ReactJS, JavaScript, and Kendo UI<br>• Exposure to GraphQL frameworks such as Hot Chocolate<br>• Experience with observability and monitoring tools such as Datadog<br>• Familiarity with NoSQL databases such as MongoDB or DocumentDB<br>• Experience with cloud-based data analytics platforms such as Databricks or Snowflake<br>• Familiarity with cloud database administration and performance optimization<br>• Experience with serverless architectures and event-driven systems<br><br></p>

notes: Analytical Wizards is part of the Definitive Healthcare family, with a strong focus on innovation and a flexible workplace.
